# Task: `<bounded implementation result>`

**ID:** `<task-id>`
**Spec:** [`<slice-id>`](../specs/SLICE.template.md)
**Contract state:** Draft — one of `Draft`, `Locked`, `Superseded`
**Version:** `1`
**Supersedes:** `<task-id or none>`

This contract may be refined while `Draft`. The commit that flips the state to `Locked` fixes the contract's exact text; runs reference that commit, and `git show <sha>:tasks/<task>.md` reproduces what was dispatched. Once locked, do not edit this file — not even to match an implementation; create a new version with `Supersedes` instead.
